steps: Log in to your Render account or create one at https://render.com/register
Give the key a descriptive name
Copy the key immediately — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Render API key. Sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

notes: Free tier available — no credit card required to sign up
The API key is displayed only once at creation time; store it securely
The API key grants all permissions your account has — treat it like a password
You can revoke and regenerate keys from the same settings page

test_endpoint.description: List accessible workspaces to verify the API key is valid
